summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens show device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name
description_clean: Onboarding screens display the device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name for the Falcon device.
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the onboarding screens that appear upon first launch or after a factory reset.
3. Look for the device name displayed on the onboarding screens.
expected: The onboarding screens display the proper product name (e.g., "Poly Voyager Free 20") for the Falcon device.
actual: The onboarding screens display the internal code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name.
